task: Cover all n8n integrations via universal adapter + typed service catalog + OpenAPI generator (not 400 packages)

phases.name: Intake
phases.notes: Chorus project, 12 packages at 0.1.2 on npm

phases.name: Decomposition
phases.notes: 4 tracks: research → catalog + api-call, openapi generator, docs

events.message: Session 5: cover n8n's integration surface via 3-shape architecture (universal + catalog + generator), not 400 individual packages

decisions.decision: Do NOT port 400 n8n integrations one-by-one
decisions.rationale: User explicitly asked for 'a way that makes sense' + 'we might not need a whole integration'. 400 packages is wrong shape — most are thin HTTP wrappers.

decisions.decision: Three-shape architecture: universal api-call + typed service catalog + OpenAPI generator
decisions.rationale: Universal adapter handles any HTTP surface; catalog provides typed auth for top-40 services; OpenAPI generator handles long-tail. 95% coverage of n8n's surface at ~0.1% of the code.
